notes: Contains raw item fields including prices/eggBonusType, prices/eggBonusValue, prices/eggBonusExp, and prices/eggBonusTime.
Also contains craftTermStudioLevel and craftTermIntelligence, which are useful later for item shop and furniture/facility work.
Left side contains egg color, monster name, required stat, threshold bands, starting skill, and 2nd skill item.
Right side contains feed item name, copper cost, Attack/Defense/Balanced/Special gains, EXP, and hatch-time remarks.
Contains the egg rank and hatch probability helper notes.
References monster category values like Atk, Def, Balance, and Special.

decodedRules.currentPlannerMeaning: The site currently treats the highest reached threshold column as the current band for a target monster.
futureWork: Decode egg level feed-cap rules cleanly enough to enforce them in the simulator.
Confirm whether the threshold columns map directly to probability bands or need another min/max formula layer.
Link target monsters to minimum egg level when that data is confirmed.
